english: otherwise / else / usually / apart from that
notes: Used in multiple ways: (1) 'otherwise/or else' to express a consequence, (2) 'usually/normally' referring to habitual behaviour, (3) 'else/apart from that' meaning 'in other respects'.

sentences.german: Beeil dich, sonst verpassen wir den Zug.
sentences.english: Hurry up, otherwise we'll miss the train.

sentences.german: Sonst trinke ich morgens immer Kaffee, aber heute hatte ich keine Zeit.
sentences.english: I usually always drink coffee in the morning, but today I had no time.
